sql_array: CREATE TABLE polygons_test (id UInt32, geometry1 Array(Array(Array(Float64))), geometry2 Array(Array(Array(Float64))) );
SELECT id, polygonsEqualsCartesian(geometry1, geometry2) AS are_equal FROM polygons_test WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE polygons_test SET geometry2 = [[[(2., 2.), (2., 5.), (5., 5.), (5., 2.), (2., 2.)]]] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, polygonsEqualsCartesian(geometry1, geometry2) AS are_equal FROM polygons_test WHERE id = 1;
